# State of AI in Hong Kong Marketing

> A comprehensive public knowledge base published by IAB Hong Kong, examining how artificial intelligence is reshaping the marketing industry in Hong Kong.

## About

This site presents the IAB Hong Kong State of AI in Marketing knowledge base — a structured wiki of supporting evidence, data points, case studies, and regulatory context. The content covers AI adoption rates, tool landscapes, use cases, workforce impacts, governance frameworks, and future projections specific to the Hong Kong marketing ecosystem.

## Content Areas

### Knowledge Base (Wiki)
The wiki contains individual entries covering specific data points, campaigns, tools, surveys, and regulations. Each entry is available at `/wiki/<slug>`. Topics include:

- Market data: Hong Kong ad spend, digital ad growth, generative AI market size
- AI tools: ChatGPT, Adobe Firefly, SenseChat, SenseTime, EternityX
- Case studies: HSBC, Cathay Pacific, Standard Chartered, Bupa, Ocean Park, Asahi
- Workforce: AI skills gap, talent shortage, upskilling initiatives, job displacement
- Governance: Personal Data Privacy Ordinance, HK Generative AI Guidelines, deepfake fraud
- Research: Deloitte-HKU AI Adoption Index, HKPC surveys, PwC HK Workforce Survey

## Key URLs

- Homepage: /
- Sitemap: /sitemap.xml
- Wiki entries: /wiki/{slug}

## Publisher

IAB Hong Kong (Interactive Advertising Bureau Hong Kong)

## Content Type

Structured knowledge base. All content is publicly accessible without authentication.
